iotcoredeviceadvisor.suitedefinition.Cfn:
Creates a Device Advisor test suite.

Requires permission to access the [CreateSuiteDefinition](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/service-authorization/latest/reference/list_awsiot.html

iotcoredeviceadvisor.suitedefinition.Sui.Description: The configuration of the Suite Definition. Listed below are the required elements of the `SuiteDefinitionConfiguration`.

iotcoredeviceadvisor.suitedefinition.Tag.Description: Metadata that can be used to manage the the Suite Definition.
